query:
INSERT INTO bupa_prerequisites (service_name, icd_codes, requirements) VALUES ('MRI', 'M23, M51, M75, M17, R51, R22, G43, C71, M54', '1- Comprehensive Medical History and physical examination findings, highlighting the indication for the MRI scan and relevant past medical and surgical history.
2- Details of the trauma history relevant to the current complaint, if found.
3- Clear provisional diagnosis.
4- Related lab results support the suspected diagnosis, if found.
5- Initial or previous relevant imaging studies (e.g. US / X-ray), if found.'), ('CT', 'R55, R51, I61.9, I63.9, C71.9, R10, K35', '1- Comprehensive Medical History and physical examination findings, highlighting the indication for the CT scan and relevant past medical and surgical history.
2- Details of the trauma history relevant to the current complaint, if found.
3- Clear provisional diagnosis.
4- Related lab results support the suspected diagnosis, if found.
5- Initial or previous relevant imaging studies (e.g. US/ X-ray), if found.'), ('Most Frequent Lab Needed', 'E11, R53, E55, E03, E05, D50', '1- HbA1c: History of relevant Present illness or medication history &/or RBS or FBS Reports if available.
2- Vit D: The medical indication for vitamin D testing. Please mention or submit the relevant evidence, if applicable.
3- FSH and LH: Initial Prolactin and TSH lab reports, clinical examination (specify if relevant to irregular menstruation, infertility, PCOS, Premature Ovarian Failure, menopause or others).
4- T4, T3: TSH lab report (in suspected cases of primary hypothyroidism).
5- Ferritin and iron: CBC lab report, detailed history of PHI, Medication history, relevant physical examination findings (not applied in cases of iron overload).'), ('Physiotherapy', 'M54, M23, M17, M75, M25, M77, M76, G83.4, G35, R26.89, R39.81, M40', '1- A detailed medical history, highlighting the duration of illness, the primary cause of patient\'s complaint and the initial management provided.
2- Physical examination findings (e.g. range of motion, reflexes, strength, ...etc).
3- Radiology report (e.g. Xray or CT or MRI).
4- A detailed proposed treatment plan (the physical therapy modalities will be followed, the number of required sessions and the Goals of treatment) along with follow-up assessment report.'), ('Medical Equipment - Glucometer', 'E11, E10', 'RBS or FBS or HbA1C or Medication history.');
